headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -51.1)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 62% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 117 quotes, including 90 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• At 47.8, frustration levels sit in the middle of the typical range but jumped significantly from yesterday's 32.8.

• Both fears and optimism improved from yesterday's lows but remain below average activity levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
